nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club and support club for the Outlaws, involved in drug trafficking and other crimes.
Major outlaw motorcycle club that uses the Black Pistons as a support club and recruitment source.
Biker club that patched over to become the first US Black Pistons chapter in 2002.
Club in Birmingham that became the first Black Pistons chapter in the UK in 2003.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club involved in a violent clash with Black Pistons in Fredericton, Canada in 2016.

edges.context: Black Pistons is an official support club for the Outlaws, providing recruitment and conducting criminal activities on their behalf.
Satan's Syndicate patched over to become the first US Black Pistons chapter in 2002.
The Brotherhood patched over to become the first UK Black Pistons chapter in 2003.
Members of the Black Pistons' Fredericton chapter were involved in a violent clash with Quebec Hells Angels bikers in October 2016.
